column1:
- Apply proper spacing around arithmetic operators to enhance code readability  
- Use compound assignment operators (e.g., +=, -=, *=, /=) to simplify arithmetic expressions  
- Understand and correctly write arithmetic expressions involving integers, respecting operator precedence  
- Avoid using commas in integer literals when declaring or assigning numerical values  
- Break down complex arithmetic expressions into simpler statements to improve code clarity and maintainability
